Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Replica Badge of the Brotherhood Turquoise Amulet League: Heist LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(16-24) to Dexterity and Intelligence Your Maximum Endurance Charges is equal to your Maximum Frenzy Charges {range:0.5}(20-25)% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill {range:0.5}(7-10)% increased Cooldown Recovery of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge +1 to Maximum Fortification per Endurance Charge {range:0.5}(20-25)% chance to lose an Endurance Charge when you gain Fortification

Rarity: UNIQUE Beacon of Madness Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Evasion) Armour: 566 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 566 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 League: Delirium Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Evasion) Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Energy Shield) Variant: Two-Toned Boots (Evasion/Energy Shield) Selected Variant: 1 {variant:2}Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Energy Shield) {variant:3}Two-Toned Boots (Evasion/Energy Shield) {variant:1}Two-Toned Boots (Armour/Evasion) Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 70 Implicits: 3 {variant:1}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Fire and Cold Resistances {variant:2}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Fire and Lightning Resistances {variant:3}{range:0.5}+(8-12)% to Cold and Lightning Resistances Grants Level 1 Embrace Madness Skill 30% increased Movement Speed {variant:1}{range:0.5}(150-300)% increased Armour and Evasion {variant:1}+15 to maximum Fortification while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:1}20% chance to deal Double Damage while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:2}{range:0.5}(20-40)% increased Effect of Non-Damaging Ailments {variant:2}You have Igniting, Chilling and Shocking Conflux while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:2}Immune to Elemental Ailments while affected by Glorious Madness {variant:3}{range:0.5}(20-40)% increased Chaos Damage {variant:3}Enemies you Kill while affected by Glorious Madness have a 40% chance to Explode, dealing a quarter of their Life as Chaos Damage {variant:3}All Damage inflicts Poison while affected by Glorious Madness
